ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant being measured */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch of the participant */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Weight of the participant in kilograms */,
  "stature_m" REAL /* Stature of the participant in meters */,
  "BMI" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) of the participant */,
  "BMI_class" TEXT /* BMI classification (e.g., Underweight, Normal, Overweight) */,
  "Height_class" TEXT /* Height classification (e.g., Normal, Tall) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., research lab, field study) */,
  "research_team" TEXT /* Team or group responsible for the data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant (e.g., Caucasian, African American) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch (e.g., Combat Arms, Combat Support) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the branch */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the branch headquarters */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the branch */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the branch was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component (e.g., Regular Army, National Guard) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the component headquarters */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the component */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anthropometric_measurements" (
  "anthropometric_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anthropometric measurement */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being referenced */,
  "abdominalextensiondepthsitting" INTEGER /* Abdominal extension depth sitting measurement */,
  "acromialheight" INTEGER /* Acromial height measurement */,
  "acromionradialelength" INTEGER /* Acromion-radiale length measurement */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the anthropometric measurement was taken */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the anthropometric data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the anthropometric data */,
  "research_team" TEXT /* Team or group responsible for the anthropometric data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anthropometric_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anthropometric_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physiological_measurements" (
  "physiological_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each physiological measurement */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being referenced */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Weight in kilograms */,
  "stature_m" REAL /* Stature in meters */,
  "BMI" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the physiological measurement was taken */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the physiological data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the physiological data */,
  "research_team" TEXT /* Team or group responsible for the physiological data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("physiological_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_physiological_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being referenced */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note or comment about the measurement */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the note */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)
